title: 美味食物[Delicious food]
body:
# Delicious food
**More delicious Chinese food.Such as dumplings, radish soup.**
![More Delicious food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b7393285311a897816ae4da7ed2dd2bc3db2636.png)
# Installation Guide
**Our mods do not require any front mods to be installed, just that you are in Minecraft version 1.19.2 and have the forge client installed (preferably the latest version of forge). In theory, your computer should be able to run our mods as long as it can run Minecraft smoothly (your game has more than 60 frames). However, if you are not sure about your computer, you can refer to [our recommended configuration](https://github.com/VaporingDeer907/Bedrock-item-mod-Minecraft/wiki).**

# What did we add?
**We added more realistic food recipes (limited to the food within the module), just like cooking in real life, from collecting the ingredients, to cleaning the ingredients, to making the food, every step is specific.We currently add several ingredients, all of which are easily available. Radish, peas, diced radish, diced carrot and minced pork. You can use the ingredients to make very nice food.**

# About finding ingredients
**We have added 4 new plants: peas, radish, mung beans and garlic. Both can be found in common terrain, such as forest and plains.**

# What can these foods bring?

**In survival, these foods can lead to a more simple, convenient and stable food source. In creation, these foods can also be used as decorations (such as market map making).**

# On language issues
**Delicious food is currently only available in two languages, Chinese and English (US), if you need additional languages or find a translation error, [please send feedback to VaporingDeer907](https://github.com/VaporingDeer907/Delicious-food-Minecraft-mod/issues)**
